name: toolshed
description: A personal Claude Code plugin marketplace. Ships doc-lifecycle: stop agents from acting on stale docs — evidence-backed drift detection, surgical fixes.

plugins.name: doc-lifecycle
plugins.description: Stop agents from acting on stale docs. Write README/CLAUDE.md/runbooks as checkable claims, audit them against the code with evidence-backed verdicts, and land fixes surgically — bootstrap → write → detect → fix.
